paragraphs.text: I'm applying to Opendoor's AI Ops role because the work fits what I already ship at Quickplay: production AI pipelines on video at scale, and a discipline around testing and reliability.
addresses: Production experience shipping LLM or ML systems

paragraphs.text: I built this application package using a small AI Ops system I wrote for it — a stacked agent pipeline with rubric evals, claim grounding against a hand-attested facts file, and a human-in-the-loop submitter. The RAG side draws on the InvestorAI work; the rest is new for this project. This is how I used AI in the application, end-to-end.
